response:
The total response time function combines all three database models into one line.  
MySQL contributes its quadratic and exponential terms to the sum line.  
Oracle adds logarithmic and inverse components to the total line.  
Sybase provides power function terms to complete the equation line.  
The final expression depends on alpha and beta values for distribution line.  
We substitute the given constants into the derived mathematical formula line.  
Calculus methods find the minimum point for the response time function line.  
Partial derivatives with respect to alpha and beta must equal zero line.  
Solving these equations yields the optimal distribution ratios for queries line.  
The solution process requires careful numerical analysis of the complex line.  
Original values for constants remain fixed during the optimization procedure line.  
The calculated alpha value is approximately zero point one two line.  
The calculated beta value is approximately zero point three five line.  
This distribution minimizes the total query response time for the system line.
